LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CARLO LABRADO'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE AND CLASS CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS ARE NOW DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND THE CLASS CLAIMS ARE NOW DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE APRIL 17, 2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: CHRISTINE JORDAN, CSR#12262, EMAIL: CJORDAN@SFTC.ORG. [302]

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Individual Claims With Prejudice And Class Claims Without Prejudice Pursuant To California Rule Of Court 3.770
Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Naomi B. Spector, Esq. of Kamber Law, T:310.400.1053, for plaintiff/moving party by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CARLO LABRADO's Motion For Dismissal Of Individual Claims With Prejudice And Class Claims Without Prejudice is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The individual claims are now dismissed with prejudice and the class claims are now dismissed without prejudice. The April 17, 2018 order to show cause hearing will be taken off calendar.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Continued To Apr-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
